scripts.build:web: cd packages/mantle/web && bun install && bun run build
scripts.build: bun run build:web && bun build packages/mantle/src/index.ts --compile --target=${TARGET:-bun} --outfile=${OUTFILE:-dist/mantle}
scripts.docker:release: docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t ghcr.io/mantle-team/mantle:${VERSION} -t ghcr.io/mantle-team/mantle:latest --push .
